changes: Venmo email parser: reads venmo@kristineskates.com via Graph API every 15 minutes
Venmo parser: extracts sender name, amount, note, transaction ID from Venmo receipt emails
Venmo parser: matches to bookings by confirmation code in note, then by amount+client name
Venmo parser: auto-marks matching bookings as Venmo paid
Venmo parser: --dry-run flag for testing without saving
venmo_payments table: stores all parsed payments with match status
Admin Venmo page at /admin/venmo: stats, payment list, manual link modal
Admin Venmo: Parse Now button triggers parser on demand
Admin sidebar: Payments section with Venmo link
